summary: Round 2 research complete: designed global-to-local workflow for Literature/ as global markdown repo with specs/literature/ as curated local working set. Proposed 5 new /literature sub-modes (--pull, --push, --new, --sync, --catalog), merged two-tier retrieval for --lit, and identified 70 unmigrated cslib entries. Report at specs/721_design_targeted_literature_retrieval/reports/02_global-local-workflow-research.md

artifacts.summary: Round 2 research: global-local literature workflow design with command proposals, merged retrieval architecture, and phased implementation plan
